chunks.en: Every night I charge my devices next to my bed.
chunks.ja: 毎晩、私はベッドのそばで自分の機器を充電します。

chunks.en: The devices I charge are my phone, my earphones, and my watch.
chunks.ja: 私が充電する機器は、スマホ、イヤホン、そして時計です。

chunks.en: I usually start charging around ten, just before I sleep.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい10時ごろ、寝る直前に充電を始めます。

chunks.en: In the morning I check my phone to see the battery level.
chunks.ja: 朝、私はバッテリーの残量を見るためにスマホを確認します。

chunks.en: One time I forgot to charge my phone and it died at work.
chunks.ja: あるとき充電を忘れて、職場でスマホの電源が切れてしまいました。

chunks.en: So now I always plug in my phone before I go to bed.
chunks.ja: だから今は、寝る前に必ずスマホを充電するようにしています。

outline: Opening: where and when I charge
Point 1: which devices I charge each night
Point 2: a time I forgot and had trouble

modelTalk.text: I charge my devices every night, and it's a simple habit now. I plug my phone in next to my bed. My earphones and my watch go on the desk close by. Sometimes I charge my tablet in the living room too. I usually start charging when I brush my teeth. Then I check the little lights before I sleep. In the morning, I look at my phone first. I want to see if it's full. Most days everything is ready, so I feel good. But one night I forgot to plug my phone in. I was so tired that I just fell asleep. The next morning my phone was almost dead. I couldn't call anyone on my way to work. Now I always check twice before bed. It's a small thing, but it really helps me.

chunks.en: Every night I charge my devices on a small table next to my bed.
chunks.ja: 毎晩、ベッドの横にある小さなテーブルで自分のデバイスを充電しています。

chunks.en: The devices I charge are my phone, my earbuds, and my smartwatch.
chunks.ja: 充電するデバイスは、スマホ、イヤホン、そしてスマートウォッチです。

chunks.en: I usually start charging around eleven and check the battery when I wake up.
chunks.ja: だいたい十一時ごろに充電を始めて、起きたときにバッテリーを確認します。

chunks.en: One time I forgot to charge my phone, and it died during my morning commute.
chunks.ja: 一度スマホの充電を忘れて、朝の通勤中に電源が切れてしまいました。

chunks.en: So now I keep a spare cable in my bag just to be safe.
chunks.ja: だから今は念のため、カバンに予備のケーブルを入れています。

outline: Opening: where and when I charge my devices
Point 1: which devices I charge every night
Point 2: a time I forgot and got in trouble
Wrap-up: how I stay prepared now

modelTalk.text: I charge my devices every night, and I've got a little routine now. I usually plug my phone in right by my bed, so I can reach it easily. My earphones and my watch go on the desk in my room. Sometimes I charge my tablet in the living room too. I start charging everything just before I go to sleep, around eleven. When I wake up, the first thing I do is check my phone. I like seeing that it's at a hundred percent. But one time I forgot to plug it in, and it was really annoying. I woke up, grabbed my phone, and the battery was almost dead. I had to rush around before work with only ten percent left. Now I try to double-check everything before bed, so it doesn't happen again.
